name: pcidss-docs-mcp
description: PCI-DSS v4.0.1 compliance documentation MCP server with 15 tools for requirement lookup, control mapping, gap analysis, and evidence collection. Supports v3.2.1 → v4.0.1 migration.
author: Ethan Troy

scripts.postinstall:
node -e "console.log('
⚠️  IMPORTANT: This tool does NOT include PCI-DSS data.

You must:
  1. Download PCI-DSS v4.0.1 from https://www.pcisecuritystandards.org/document_library/
  2. Accept the PCI DSS License Agreement
  3. Run: npm run convert-pdfs

See SETUP.md for detailed instructions.
')"
scripts.check-data: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='data/converted/requirements.json'; if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('❌ Missing '+p+'\nRun: npm run convert-pdfs');process.exit(1)}else{console.log('✅ Data files present')}"
